title: Shri Yamuna Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Yamuna Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Yamuna.
description:
Om Jai Yamuna Mata,
Hari Jai Yamuna Mata.
Jo nahave phal paave,
Sukh dukh ki daata॥
॥ Om Jai Yamuna Mata ॥

Pavitra ShriYamuna jal,
Agam bahai dhara,
Jo jan sharan mein aaya,
Kar diya nistara॥
॥ Om Jai Yamuna Mata ॥

Jo jan hi darshan,
Hi nitya snan kare,
Yam ke traas na paave,
Jo nitya dhyan kare॥
॥ Om Jai Yamuna Mata ॥

Kalikal mein mahima jai,
Jai jai mata avatar liyo,
Nitya nirmal jal peekar,
Kans ko maar diyo॥
॥ Om Jai Yamuna Mata ॥

Namo mata bhay harni,
Shubh mangal karni,
Manmohak bhaya hain,
Tum bin vaitarni॥
॥ Om Jai Yamuna Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Shri Yamuna Mata's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed for the purification of the mind, cleansing of sins, and deepening one's devotion to Lord Shri Krishna.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Yamuna Mata?
faq.a2: The day of 'Yamuna Chhath' is considered very special for her, although daily darshan and Aarti are also considered excellent.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Mother Yamuna during Aarti?
faq.a3: She is very fond of milk, white flowers, Mishri (sugar candy), and sattvic fruits.
faq.q4: Can Yamuna Mata's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed at home by treating a vessel of water (Kalash) as the Yamuna with full rituals and devotion.
faq.q5: What should be recited after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Reciting the 'Yamuna Ashtakam' or 'Yamuna Stotram' after the Aarti is best for mental and spiritual peace.
